zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil Morel於1070年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，她的父親Arkil De Morel40歲，母親Sigrid De Morel30歲。她於1095年之前與Gospatric II在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1125年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil Morel于1070年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，她的父亲Arkil De Morel40岁，母亲Sigrid De Morel30岁。她于1095年之前与Gospatric II在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1125年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴。

nameMeanings.name: Morel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Luis, Francisco, Juana, Rafael, Ramon, Jorge, Juan, Julio, Miguel, Pedro.  French Armand, Andre, Franck, Francois, Francoise, Marcel, Normand, Pierre, Alphonse, Benoit, Camille, Cecile.
French and Spanish: from the medieval personal name Morel, from the Latin name Maurellus, derived from Maurus ‘Moor’ (see Mauro , compare Moreau 1).
French: nickname for a dark-skinned man, from Old French morel ‘dark brown, black’, a diminutive of moré ‘brown, black’ (see More 2, compare Moreau 2). Compare also Morell 3 and Morrell 2.

variants.name: Mauro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Domenic, Giuseppe, Antonio, Carmine, Carmelo, Domenico, Gaetano, Nino, Pasquale.

Italian (mainly southern): from the personal name Mauro, derived from the Latin personal and ethnic name Maurus, borne by various early Christian saints and meaning ‘Moor, North African’. Compare Moore and Moro .

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil Morel was born in 1070, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Arkil De Morel, was 40 and her mother, Sigrid De Morel, was 30. She married Gospatric II before 1095, in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1125, in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil Morel est née en 1070, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Arkil De Morel, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sigrid De Morel, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Gospatric II avant 1095, à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1125, à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil Morel 1070 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arkil De Morel 40 und ihre Mutter Sigrid De Morel 30. Sie hat vor 1095 in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Gospatric II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1125 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Morel è nata il nel 1070 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Arkil De Morel, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Sigrid De Morel, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Gospatric II prima del 1095, nel Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1125, nel Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil Morelが1070年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Arkil De Morelは40歳，母Sigrid De Morelは30歳であった。1095年以前にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーでGospatric IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1125年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーで55歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Morel(이)가 1070년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arkil De Morel(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sigrid De Morel(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1095년 이전 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에서 Gospatric II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1125년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Morel nasceu em 1070, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Arkil De Morel, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sigrid De Morel, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Gospatric II antes 1095, em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1125, em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil Morel родилась в 1070 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Arkil De Morel было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sigrid De Morel, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gospatric II перед 1095 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1125 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil Morel nació en 1070, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Arkil De Morel, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sigrid De Morel, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Gospatric II antes de 1095, en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1125, en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
